title: Healthy Eating for Everyone
passage:
Healthy Eating

Eating healthy is important for everyone. It helps us stay fit and feel good. A good diet has many fruits and vegetables. Fruits like apples, bananas, and oranges are tasty and good for our bodies. Vegetables like carrots, broccoli, and spinach are also very healthy.

Water is very important too. We should drink a lot of water every day. It helps us stay healthy and keeps our skin nice. Many people like to drink juice, but it is better to drink water.

Eating too much junk food is not good. Junk food includes chips, candy, and soda. These foods can make us feel tired and unhealthy. It is better to eat home-cooked meals. They are usually healthier and can be very tasty.

Exercise is important as well. When we exercise, we feel better. It helps our muscles and bones. Walking, running, and playing sports are great ways to exercise. We should try to be active every day.
